le Guide Java Classes Ptolemy II Home Ptolemy Home Skip to sidebar Ptolemy II 7.0.1 Notes for Mac OS X We are not including Macintosh installers, you will need to rebuild download Ptolemy II sources and then follow the command line build instructions

nd then follow the command line build instructions . Macintosh Specific Notes Make sure you have Xcode Tools installed, this has the gcc, make environment and other tools necessary to do development on the Mac. Xcode is available on the Macintosh ins

n the Mac. Xcode is available on the Macintosh install disk that comes with the machine and is not installed by default. You can also download Xcode , but it is 924Mb! Upgrade the Java on the Mac from Apple to the latest release. Sun Java doesn't wor

Apple to the latest release. Sun Java doesn't work on the Mac, Apple releases its own JVM and javac from time to time on http://developer.apple.com See also the Ptolemy II 5.0 Mac Instructions Contact Update Help Copyright © 1999 - UC Regents; all r
